evidence.label: Plan: Chest pain
evidence.excerpt: Send a Troponin I on the initial sample (reason: chest pain) to assess for myocardial injury.

evidence.label: Transcript
evidence.excerpt: Let's send a Troponin I on this first sample — that's the marker for heart muscle damage — the reason being the chest pain.

evidence.label: Plan: Chest pain
evidence.excerpt: Obtain a 12-lead ECG now to look for ischaemic changes.

evidence.label: Transcript
evidence.excerpt: And get a 12-lead ECG done now.

evidence.label: Plan: Chest pain
evidence.excerpt: Order a Full Blood Count with U&Es to check baseline haematology and renal function before contrast or anticoagulation.

evidence.label: Transcript
evidence.excerpt: Also send a Full Blood Count with U&Es so we've got baseline bloods and kidney function.

evidence.label: Plan: Shortness of breath
evidence.excerpt: Order a COVID PCR swab as part of the acute admission screen.

evidence.label: Transcript
evidence.excerpt: And as part of the admission screen, please add a COVID PCR swab, and a Chest X-Ray to make sure there's nothing in the lungs.

evidence.label: Plan: Shortness of breath
evidence.excerpt: Order a Chest X-Ray to exclude an acute respiratory cause (reviewed — reported normal).

evidence.label: Transcript
evidence.excerpt: and a Chest X-Ray to make sure there's nothing in the lungs.
